project.name: Sylphx Consultant MCP
project.summary: Beta MCP stdio server package for typed consultant review, research synthesis, answer challenge, and option comparison by autonomous agents.

surfaces.name: @sylphx/consultant-mcp package
surfaces.description: Public npm package metadata, export map, files, and beta package version.

surfaces.name: sylphx-consultant-mcp
surfaces.description: Stdio MCP server binary declared through the package bin field.

surfaces.name: Typed MCP tool schemas and server
surfaces.description: Product contract for review, research, challenge, and option-comparison tools.

surfaces.name: Rust MCP server entry point
surfaces.description: Rust rmcp stdio/HTTP server that exposes the typed consultant tools.

surfaces.name: Repository README
surfaces.description: Beta status, tool overview, configuration, safety model, and project-control entry point.

surfaces.name: Architecture and usage docs
surfaces.description: Architecture, usage, ADRs, and project-control specs for local beta package consumers.

surfaces.name: CI/admission
surfaces.description: ADR-29 admission, npm package verification, project-control tests, and GroundAtlas package dogfood.

surfaces.name: Doctrine adapter manifest
surfaces.description: Sylphx Doctrine adapter and org-local governance catalog; not the vendor-neutral GroundAtlas default.

surfaces.name: Release/publish
surfaces.description: Protected GitHub-hosted npm release workflow with provenance publish, registry readback, install smoke, tag creation, and GitHub release readback.

surfaces.name: Release runbook
surfaces.description: Operational proof and recovery procedure for public npm package releases.

commands.name: install
commands.purpose: Install locked npm dependencies without lockfile drift.

commands.name: verify
commands.purpose: Run typecheck, tests, build, and dry-run npm package verification.

commands.name: test:project-control
commands.purpose: Verify neutral manifest, Doctrine adapter, CI gate, and package-publication boundary.

commands.name: groundatlas:fleet
commands.purpose: Prove the vendor-neutral manifest is selected and generated GroundAtlas files are navigation-only.

commands.name: release:readback
commands.command: npm view @sylphx/consultant-mcp version dist-tags time gitHead dist.integrity --json
commands.purpose: Read back the public npm package version, integrity, and publish metadata after protected release workflow completion.

adoption.notes: Vendor-neutral GroundAtlas manifest for package/action dogfooding. .doctrine/project.json remains the Sylphx Doctrine adapter and local governance catalog. Generated .groundatlas* files plus GroundAtlas JSON/Markdown reports are evidence/navigation only, not source of truth. Public npm release is controlled by an already-versioned release PR plus the protected GitHub-hosted release workflow; publication is only complete after npm registry, install-smoke, and GitHub release readback.
